items.title: S01E01 - She-Wolf of London
items.summary: After acquiring the lycanthropic curse, Randi meets a fortuneteller remarkably familiar with Randi's supernatural ring.

infolabels.title: She-Wolf of London
infolabels.plot: After acquiring the lycanthropic curse, Randi meets a fortuneteller remarkably familiar with Randi's supernatural ring.

items.title: S01E02 - The Bogman of Letchmoor Heath
items.summary: The reanimated corpse of a long-dead hanged man found in a peat bog begins murdering denizens of an English village.

infolabels.title: The Bogman of Letchmoor Heath
infolabels.plot: The reanimated corpse of a long-dead hanged man found in a peat bog begins murdering denizens of an English village.

items.title: S01E03 - Moonlight Becomes You
items.summary: Randi and Ian help the twin sister of a werewolf held by a scientist as an experimental subject.

infolabels.title: Moonlight Becomes You
infolabels.plot: Randi and Ian help the twin sister of a werewolf held by a scientist as an experimental subject.

items.title: S01E04 - The Juggler
items.summary: A satanic priest steers the daughter of minister to a murderous "devil clown" apparition.

infolabels.title: The Juggler
infolabels.plot: A satanic priest steers the daughter of minister to a murderous "devil clown" apparition.

items.title: S01E05 - Nice Girls Don't
items.summary: A succubus (a female sexual demon) is turning young men into withered old shells.

infolabels.title: Nice Girls Don't
infolabels.plot: A succubus (a female sexual demon) is turning young men into withered old shells.

items.title: S01E06 - Little Bookshop of Horrors
items.summary: An antiquarian bookshop owner used demonic tomes to create murderous versions of famous literary characters.

infolabels.title: Little Bookshop of Horrors
infolabels.plot: An antiquarian bookshop owner used demonic tomes to create murderous versions of famous literary characters.

items.title: S01E07 - Can't Keep a Dead Man Down (1)
items.summary: Randi's ex-fiancee movie producer Charlie Beaudine falsely promises to option Ian's book; Ian's department head apparently kills him, adding him to her horde of cannibalistic zombies.

infolabels.title: Can't Keep a Dead Man Down (1)
infolabels.plot: Randi's ex-fiancee movie producer Charlie Beaudine falsely promises to option Ian's book; Ian's department head apparently kills him, adding him to her horde of cannibalistic zombies.

items.title: S01E08 - Can't Keep a Dead Man Down (2)
items.summary: Ian returns as an apparent zombie, and thwarts Dr. Stevens' plan to use Randi as a human sacrifice to her zombie horde. (Part 2 of 2)

infolabels.title: Can't Keep a Dead Man Down (2)
infolabels.plot: Ian returns as an apparent zombie, and thwarts Dr. Stevens' plan to use Randi as a human sacrifice to her zombie horde. (Part 2 of 2)

items.title: S01E09 - The Wild Hunt
items.summary: The murderous ghost of a huntsman wreaks vengeance on the descendants of the townspeople who killed him.

infolabels.title: The Wild Hunt
infolabels.plot: The murderous ghost of a huntsman wreaks vengeance on the descendants of the townspeople who killed him.

items.title: S01E10 - What's Got into Them?
items.summary: The spirits of a Russian noblewoman, her husband, and Ian's murdered colleague possess members of the Matheson household.

infolabels.title: What's Got into Them?
infolabels.plot: The spirits of a Russian noblewoman, her husband, and Ian's murdered colleague possess members of the Matheson household.

items.title: S01E11 - Big Top She-Wolf
items.summary: A demonic, seductive circus ringmaster, who has stolen the souls of his performers, attempts to steal Randi's.

infolabels.title: Big Top She-Wolf
infolabels.plot: A demonic, seductive circus ringmaster, who has stolen the souls of his performers, attempts to steal Randi's.

items.title: S01E12 - She-Devil
items.summary: An experimental synthetic aphrodisiac turns a former classmate of Ian's into a deadly, savage beast.

infolabels.title: She-Devil
infolabels.plot: An experimental synthetic aphrodisiac turns a former classmate of Ian's into a deadly, savage beast.

items.title: S01E13 - Voodoo Child
items.summary: One of Ian's new students, an arrogant expert in Guarani Indian ways, uses voodoo to torment Randi and Ian.

infolabels.title: Voodoo Child
infolabels.plot: One of Ian's new students, an arrogant expert in Guarani Indian ways, uses voodoo to torment Randi and Ian.

items.title: S01E14 - Beyond the Beyond
items.summary: The creator of the cult-favorite science fiction series Beyond the Beyond is apparently killed at a fan convention.

infolabels.title: Beyond the Beyond
infolabels.plot: The creator of the cult-favorite science fiction series Beyond the Beyond is apparently killed at a fan convention.

items.title: S01E15 - Curiosity Killed the Cravitz
items.summary: When Randi's California friend Ellen Cravitz is killed by a troll in league with aliens, Ian and Randi go to the U.S. to investigate, and decide to stay when Ian becomes host of his own talk show about the supernatural, How Strange, on station KBLA.

infolabels.title: Curiosity Killed the Cravitz
infolabels.plot: When Randi's California friend Ellen Cravitz is killed by a troll in league with aliens, Ian and Randi go to the U.S. to investigate, and decide to stay when Ian becomes host of his own talk show about the supernatural, How Strange, on station KBLA.

items.title: S01E16 - Habeas Corpses
items.summary: Searching for a female vampire who may have killed her own husband, Randi and Ian infiltrate a law firm.

infolabels.title: Habeas Corpses
infolabels.plot: Searching for a female vampire who may have killed her own husband, Randi and Ian infiltrate a law firm.

items.title: S01E17 - Bride of the Wolfman
items.summary: Randi and Ian, investigating strange goings-on at a movie theater, mystically become part of an old horror film.

infolabels.title: Bride of the Wolfman
infolabels.plot: Randi and Ian, investigating strange goings-on at a movie theater, mystically become part of an old horror film.

items.title: S01E18 - Heart Attack
items.summary: The duo confronts a legion of crazed cupids wielding crossbows that fire homicide-inducing rays into people in love.

infolabels.title: Heart Attack
infolabels.plot: The duo confronts a legion of crazed cupids wielding crossbows that fire homicide-inducing rays into people in love.

items.title: S01E19 - Mystical Pizza
items.summary: Randi goes undercover at the Three Gals from Salem pizza shop after customers start turning into animals.

infolabels.title: Mystical Pizza
infolabels.plot: Randi goes undercover at the Three Gals from Salem pizza shop after customers start turning into animals.

items.title: S01E20 - Eclipse
items.summary: A lunar eclipse affects Randi's curse, leading her to seek help at an institute for the "supernaturally gifted."
